product_name: Cognitive Firewall Instruments - authoring defensive instruments against AI-mediated analytic corruption
project_title: Cognitive Firewall Instruments - authoring defensive instruments against AI-mediated analytic corruption
runtime_target: packet registry, routing table, and promotion decision board
operational_end_state: A reviewer can see source identity, authority, route, output impact, and next build decision.
full_build_definition: A research packet with question, method, evidence, source utilization, analysis plan, limitations, artifact outputs, review gates, and submission or conference-readiness criteria.
full_operational_evidence_standard: Research question, literature position, method, evidence table, claim-to-source map, draft, counterargument handling, review log, and submission/readiness decision.
required_modules_to_build: source registry | output mapping | claim boundary | close-read queue
current_status: source-backed proof build; needs source-to-output capture and close-read strengthening
promotion_stage: full-build candidate; execute minimum operational release next
operational_status: near-operational proof package; not fully operational
fully_operational_reason: Full operational standing requires live/replayable execution evidence, source verification where sources govern claims, and outside/user validation. Those conditions are not all recorded.
execution_evidence_state: 17/17 package-verifiable runs; 0 instrumented runs still need capture.
remaining_gaps: human-verified source integration still missing | full-build readiness score below expert release threshold | outside/user validation not yet recorded
next_operational_build: Add method-result boundary, validity threats, what the study can and cannot generalize, and a practitioner-facing implication.
tests_required_for_full_standing: run the representative fixture end to end | capture input, operation, output, and state/export record | verify acceptance tests and falsifier | verify privacy/no-local-path release safety | promote at least one load-bearing source to human-verified artifact integration when source claims are present | record reviewer or outside-use validation before stronger public claims
public_claim_now: May claim a full-build candidate exists with proof and source contracts; do not claim deployment, outside validation, or production readiness until live execution and passage verification are recorded.
claim_boundary: This is a full-build plan, not a claim that the full operational system has already been completed.
